---
title: "js_sentinel.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/js_sentinel.ts"
loc: 97
complexity: 8
logic_score: 5.40
style_score: 3.92
intel_score: 2.22
overall_score: 3.85
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.2/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 1 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [execa](file://execa)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [*](file://node:path)
- [fileURLToPath](file://node:url)

### Exports
- `__filename`
- `__dirname`
- `PROJECT_ROOT`
- `CONFIG_PATH`
- `getActivePersona`
- `configData`
- `config`
- `TEXT_MAP`
- `runSentinel`
- `persona`
- `text`
- `execa`
- `results`
- `totalViolations`
- `violations`
- `color`
- `loc`
- `ruleName`
- `target`
